# XoggAI

XoggAI is a testnet-first intent router for x402 APIs. Agents send
natural-language intents to `/intent`; XoggAI embeds the intent, searches
registered x402 endpoints, and reranks candidates for inspection before any
execution path opens.

Website: https://xoggai-agent.com
Docs: https://xoggai-agent.com/docs
Connect Agent: https://xoggai-agent.com/connect-agent/
Backend API: https://xoggai-backend.onrender.com
OpenAPI: https://xoggai-agent.com/openapi.json
Skill: https://xoggai-agent.com/skill.md

## Public API

- `GET /health`
- `GET /ready`
- `GET /api/info`
- `GET /api/execution-status`
- `GET /intent?q=<intent>&budget=0.005&dry=true`
- `GET /search?q=<query>&limit=5&dry=true`
- `GET /api/stats`
- `GET /api/endpoints`

## Beta User API

- `POST /api/beta/auth/login`
- `POST /api/beta/auth/logout`
- `GET /api/beta/dashboard/me`
- `GET /api/beta/dashboard/requests`
- `POST /api/beta/dashboard/requests`

## Operator API

- `GET /api/admin/beta/requests`
- `PATCH /api/admin/beta/requests/:id`
- `POST /api/admin/beta/requests/:id/execute-testnet`

## Execution Model

Use `dry=true` for route selection without upstream execution or payment.
`GET /intent` never executes a paid call.

Controlled execution is separate:

```text
dry-run route -> public beta request -> operator approval -> Base Sepolia x402 execution -> proof
```

Mainnet execution is disabled. Base Sepolia is the active testnet execution
network. Browser code must not contain beta keys, admin keys, or wallet private
keys.

## Developer Kit

- JavaScript helper: `https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/xoggai-sdk.js`
- curl examples: `https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/curl.md`
- Claude instructions: `https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/claude.md`
- Codex instructions: `https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/codex.md`
- Cursor instructions: `https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/cursor.md`

## Brand Context

Ticker: `$XOGG`
Positioning: intelligence becomes action
Core line: dry-run x402 intent routing for AI agents, with operator-approved
Base Sepolia execution and mainnet disabled.
